description:
## What it does

DexScreener market data over x402: search DEX trading pairs, read live price / liquidity / volume, and surface newly launched and trending tokens across major chains, through one provider with TRON and BSC payment routes.


## Best for

- New-pool / meme-launch radar for agents tracking fresh listings.
- Momentum and liquidity checks before entering a position.
- Pair lookups by token address or symbol.

## Endpoints

- `GET /latest/dex/tokens/{tokenAddresses}` вАФ All DEX pairs (price/liquidity/volume/fdv) for one or more token addresses
- `GET /latest/dex/search` вАФ Search pairs by token name/symbol/address
- `GET /token-profiles/latest/v1` вАФ Latest token profiles (new-launch / discovery radar)

## Code usage

These routes are x402-paid passthroughs. Use x402 payment for gateway access. TRON Mainnet supports `exact` + `permit2` and `exact_gasfree`; GasFree example:

```bash
curl -sS 'https://x402-gateway.bankofai.io/providers/dexscreener-dex-data-tron/latest/dex/tokens/{tokenAddresses}'
```

Pay on TRON Mainnet with the x402 CLI (amount in USD):

```bash
x402-cli pay 'https://x402-gateway.bankofai.io/providers/dexscreener-dex-data-tron/latest/dex/tokens/{tokenAddresses}' \
  --method GET \
  --network tron:0x2b6653dc \
  --token USDT \
  --scheme exact_gasfree \
  --max-amount 0.000001
```

BNB Smart Chain Mainnet (`eip155:56`, `exact` + `permit2`) example:

```bash
curl -sS 'https://x402-gateway.bankofai.io/providers/dexscreener-dex-data-bsc/latest/dex/tokens/{tokenAddresses}'
```

Pay on BNB Smart Chain Mainnet with the x402 CLI (amount in USD):

```bash
x402-cli pay 'https://x402-gateway.bankofai.io/providers/dexscreener-dex-data-bsc/latest/dex/tokens/{tokenAddresses}' \
  --method GET \
  --network eip155:56 \
  --token USDT \
  --scheme exact \
  --max-amount 0.000001
```

endpoints.description: All DEX pairs (price/liquidity/volume/fdv) for one or more token addresses
